_comment: Remote code-index MCP (Streamable HTTP) for gitnexus-arch-doc optional Phase 1.
_usage: Replace the url with your serve origin + /api/mcp. fetch-arch-data.js also accepts --with-snippets for symbol bodies in arch-data.json.

_placeholders.GITNEXUS_URL: http://127.0.0.1:11011 — same host:port as `gitnexus serve`, not gitnexus-web
